issues.title: NullPointerException org.springframework.ai.ollama.OllamaChatModel.from(OllamaChatModel.java:174)
issues.body:
spring ai 1.0.0
ollama version is 0.9.2 

java.lang.NullPointerException: 
Cannot invoke "java.time.Duration.plus(java.time.Duration)" because "evalDuration" is null

comments.body: This issue was previously fixed by PR:#3372, perhaps you can upgrade to version 1.1.0-SNAPSHOT first.

> This issue was previously fixed by PR:[#3372](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/pull/3372), perhaps you can upgrade to version 1.1.0-SNAPSHOT first.

Thank you, indeed. After I changed the version number, the program started working properly.
